tool_args.label: LIRR Office of Security APTA Gold Award 2025

payload.claim_text: LIRR Office of Security was the proud recipient of the 2025 APTA Gold Award for innovative Safety and Security program for the development and implementation of the Operations Security Console and Reporting (O.S.C.A.R) Dashboard.

tool_args.label: MNR Security TSA Gold Standard Award 2024

payload.claim_text: MNR Security is the proud recipient of the 2024 TSA Gold Standard Award for the Baseline Assessment for Security (BASE) from the U.S. Department of Homeland Security (DHS), Transportation Security Administration (TSA).

tool_args.label: Workplace Violence Penal Law Data Revision Note

payload.gap_text: MTAPD became the primary railroad workplace violence penal law source as of 10/2024. Data prior to this date will have additional security records added under harassment. Updated data will be reflected at a subsequent committee meeting.
payload.description: Workplace Violence Penal Law data for LIRR and MNR will have additional security records added under harassment for periods before October 2024 due to MTAPD becoming the primary source.

Vision Zero provides training on defensive driving practices for Bus Operators. Training is provided once every two years and rotated with DMV Article 19A training. The update is in concept phase with updated topics directed at Bus Operators. Rollout starting in July.

warnings: project.agency is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Agency names should link to entity records when supported. Suggested relation: implemented_by.

payload.description: Operator behavior data logger tool installed on all 242 buses at Casey Stengel Depot. Used to monitor bus operation and coach operators on parameters such as time, high rate braking and accelerations, speeding, and B/O Pass Number. DOB is piloting and may expand in the future.
payload.agency: New York City Transit - Department of Buses

warnings: project.agency is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Agency names should link to entity records when supported. Suggested relation: implemented_by.

payload.description: Four simulators for Operator training and retraining; one at Spring Creek Depot and three at Zerega.

payload.project_name: Together Railroads and Communities Keeping Safe (TRACKS)
payload.description: Program providing opportunities for MNR to educate riders and the public on safe behaviors when traveling on trains and navigating railroad grade crossings. Strengthens public awareness and reinforces safe practices.

warnings: project.agency is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Agency names should link to entity records when supported. Suggested relation: implemented_by.

payload.description: Collaborated with Station Operations and the MNR Fire Brigade to implement a proactive, voluntary stretching initiative aimed at reducing overexertion and soft tissue injuries.

payload.description: Assists individuals in crisis by connecting them with shelter and mental health services. Made hundreds of contacts in the third quarter, resulting in multiple referrals to care facilities by embedded clinicians.

payload.description: Standardizes inspection protocols, enabling real-time reporting of hazards such as scaffold integrity, electrical safety, and traffic control compliance.

payload.project_name: Integration of Safety Management System (SMS) into Contracts
payload.description: C&D is collaborating with Legal and Contracts to finalize updates to Division 1 requirements and embed SMS provisions into future consultant and contractor agreements.
